notes: Oneironautics Inc., Portland OR (2004) · SURVEY WALK / MEASUREMENT-AS-ATTENTION. Ines Rocha solo, the year after Mrs. Wu's Garden, the year before she pitched Estuary 4. One king-tide morning, twelve stations, a county notebook with two ruled lines per station. The limit is the game. Meridian Heritage remade it in 2048 and removed the limit, which is the whole story of 2048.

shelf.label_subtitle: one morning · twelve stations · two lines each
shelf.shelf_condition: the case corner is salt-swollen · inside, a real pencil stub, sharpened with a knife, that nobody in this cabin will throw away
